summary: Slack bot logs raw user messages, full API responses, and startup config to stdout — 3 HIGH-severity data exposure vectors
Enterprise API has permissive CORS (any origin), no user authentication, and trusts x-forwarded-* headers for URL construction
Zero integration packages are imported by opencode production runtime — all are standalone, build-time, or test-time only
packages/identity is an orphan directory with no package.json — likely abandoned auth prototype
